title: ZXSnake Complete Guide
description: Everything you need to know about ZXSnake, from mastering the controls to achieving high scores, unlocking achievements, and competing online.
summary: Learn how to play ZXSnake, improve your skills, unlock rewards, and master every game mode.

sections.heading: Welcome to ZXSnake
paragraphs: ZXSnake is a modern take on the classic arcade snake game and part of the ZX Series from BarkinMad Studios.
Guide your snake around the arena, collect food, grow longer, avoid collisions, and challenge yourself to achieve higher scores with every game.

sections.heading: How to Play
paragraphs: Every game begins with a small snake. Collect food to grow longer while avoiding walls, obstacles, and your own tail.
As the snake grows, careful planning and quick reactions become increasingly important.

sections.heading: Master the Controls
paragraphs: Quick, confident turns are the key to surviving longer games. Try to plan your route ahead instead of reacting at the last second.
The more comfortable you become with the controls, the easier it is to navigate tight spaces as your snake grows.

sections.heading: Choose Your Challenge
paragraphs: ZXSnake offers multiple ways to play, whether you're practising on your own, challenging friends, or competing online.
Each mode offers a different experience while sharing the same classic snake gameplay.

sections.heading: High Scores
paragraphs: Every piece of food collected increases your score, but surviving longer is the key to achieving truly impressive results.
The best players balance careful planning with quick reactions, allowing them to keep growing without becoming trapped.

sections.heading: Achievements
paragraphs: Game Center achievements reward regular play and important gameplay milestones.
Every achievement gives you another reason to keep improving your skills.

sections.heading: BarkinMad Coins
paragraphs: Earn BarkinMad Coins through gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic rewards across supported ZX Series games.
Coins reward regular play without changing the classic arcade experience.

sections.heading: Leaderboards
paragraphs: Compete against players around the world through Game Center and see how your best scores compare.
Every game is another opportunity to climb the rankings.

sections.heading: Tips & Strategy
paragraphs: Plan ahead, stay calm, and avoid unnecessary risks. Small improvements in positioning and decision-making will help you survive much longer.
Every game teaches something new, so don't be afraid to learn from your mistakes.

faq.question: Can I play ZXSnake on my own?
faq.answer: Yes. Solo mode is perfect for practising and improving your high score.

faq.question: Do achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins work together?
faq.answer: Yes. Every game contributes towards achievements, leaderboard progress, and earning BarkinMad Coins.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything You Need to Master ZXSnake
featureShowcases.summary: From your first game to your highest score, this guide explains every part of ZXSnake.
body: Whether you're just getting started or aiming for the top of the leaderboards, this guide brings together everything you need in one place.
Learn the controls, explore the game modes, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and improve your high scores.

image.caption: Everything you need to become a ZXSnake master.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Game Helps You Improve
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins reward every game you play.
body: As your skills improve, you'll unlock achievements, climb the leaderboards, and earn BarkinMad Coins to unlock cosmetic rewards across the ZX Series.
Every game helps you become a stronger player.

image.caption: Every game brings you closer to your next achievement.
